project_type: Gradle multi-module Java CLI - deterministic governance tool (BEAR)
build_system: Gradle with wrapper (gradlew), multi-module: kernel/ and app/. Root build.gradle applies java plugin to all subprojects. kernel/build.gradle adds snakeyaml:2.2 dependency. Cannot run Gradle in sandbox due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network.
test_framework: JUnit 5 (junit-jupiter:5.10.2) with @TempDir for filesystem tests. Tests in kernel/src/test/java/com/bear/kernel/ package (not mirroring source package hierarchy exactly).
build_command: Cannot run Gradle build in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY mode. Use javac for syntax validation.
test_command: Cannot run Gradle test in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY mode. Validate Java syntax with javac.
verification_instructions: 1. Use javac 17 to compile all new and modified .java files to verify syntax correctness. 2. Verify all imports resolve to existing types. 3. Verify test files compile against JUnit 5 APIs.
setup_instructions: Java 17 available at /root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17. Set JAVA_HOME accordingly. No other setup needed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - Gradle cannot download distributions or dependencies. Maven Central unreachable. Use javac directly for syntax validation only. Cannot run full Gradle build or test suite.
contribution_requirements: Keep kernel/ deterministic and small (trusted seed). No LLM/agent logic in core. Stay within v1-preview scope. Use Java records where appropriate.
key_patterns: Records used for value types (e.g., UndeclaredReachFinding, BoundaryBypassFinding, TargetCheckIssue). Enums for kinds (TargetCheckIssueKind, TargetId). Interfaces for extension points (Target). JvmTarget is the primary Target implementation (~1687 lines). TargetRegistry uses Map<TargetId, Target> with hardcoded JVM fallback. Tests use com.bear.kernel package (not mirroring source packages). @TempDir for filesystem tests.
directory_structure: kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/ - core target types and interfaces. kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/jvm/ - JVM target implementation. kernel/src/test/java/com/bear/kernel/ - test files (flat package, not mirroring source). app/ - CLI orchestration module. .kiro/tasks/ - task definitions for implementation phases.
